constraint_audit.source: public objective plan plus compass inverse algebra

label_sources.move_exit_count_after: counterfactual admissible_actions_after or next factual step
label_sources.room_relation: normalized next_obs room vs current/prior rooms

data_audit.task: multichannel action-conditioned real TextWorld event delta

graph_audit.inverse_binding: same observed physical edge at binding step
graph_audit.source: past factual observations and executed moves only

objective_plan_audit.compiler: word-boundary compass directions in text order plus take coin

tree_repair_audit.rule: if first delta has no room text, preserve physical current room; a following look is room_same, not room_previous

research_hypothesis.statement: The frozen topology constraint should preserve perfect matched quality and SNN train-response advantages on unseen games.
research_hypothesis.what_if: What if exact event constraints plus a closed-form residual form a reproducible real-time world-state substrate?
